headline: Counselors help campers experience camp with direct encouragement and daily support
subheadline: Counselors are central to the Summer Camp experience, walking alongside campers through activities, meals, cabin life, worship, recreation, and the relational moments that make camp memorable.

sections.title: Presence throughout the day
sections.description: Counselors are present with campers through the full rhythm of camp, helping create continuity and trust.

sections.title: Encouragement and support
sections.description: The role is both practical and relational, helping campers participate and feel included.

sections.title: Part of a larger team
sections.description: Counselors serve alongside staff, medical volunteers, junior counselors, and leaders rather than carrying the work alone.

cta.heading: Read the volunteer overview or reach out if you think the counselor role may be the right fit.
cta.body: The best volunteer path starts with clarity about how you want to serve.
